title: Surgeon Vacancy at AIIMS Delhi - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at AIIMS Delhi - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AIIMS Delhi. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About AIIMS Delhi:
AIIMS Delhi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Delhi!
